evals.prompt: Check the bottom navigation bar against the spec. The app is running at http://localhost:3000. The spec is at /Users/elvin/Documents/GitHub/hive-mind/docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-27-hive-mind-ux-design.md. Save outputs to the outputs directory.
evals.expected_output: A structured findings doc for the bottom nav bar covering: tab count (should be 4: Tasks/Calendar/Chat/Mine), active tab color (should be rust #c2410c), inactive tab color (#a8a29e), any missing or extra tabs. Screenshots and computed style checks included.

evals.prompt: Check the Task Overview screen (/tasks) against the spec. The app is running at http://localhost:3000. The spec is at /Users/elvin/Documents/GitHub/hive-mind/docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-27-hive-mind-ux-design.md. Save outputs to the outputs directory.
evals.expected_output: Findings covering: page background color (warm cream #fdf8f4), task cards with 4px left border (not pill badges), search bar presence, tag filter pills, group headers (Today/This week/Later), screen title weight/size. Issues clearly flagged with spec vs actual values.

evals.prompt: Check the Chat screen (/chat) against the spec. The app is running at http://localhost:3000. The spec is at /Users/elvin/Documents/GitHub/hive-mind/docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-27-hive-mind-ux-design.md. Save outputs to the outputs directory.
